text:
Created attachment 212487
lam71.txt

LAM 7.1 with Webauthn/FIDO2 and AD LDS support
The 2-factor authentication was extended with Webauthn/FIDO2. You can manage AD LDS users and groups (LAM Pro).

LAM 7.0 with usability improvements
This release includes usability improvements such as better search and more compact edit pages.

LAM 6.9 with Duo support
LAM's 2-Factor-Authentication system supports Duo. The self service can show a custom footer on its pages.
